posts.author: Alex Fedotoff
posts.text:
NOTHING holds spend like VSLs on Facebook.

Most ads will never survive the testing phase.

99% of the ads you test will never spend more than $10k at KPI.

VSL's can spend $50-$100K+. Return of time/resources is definitely positive. Swipe file of VSL bangers below, enjoy
posts.why: Ads tactics with real substance: specific claim about a format that holds spend, plus a swipe file.

posts.author: Sean Frank
posts.text:
im quitting this "rich and famous and powerful ceo" shit
